name: socratic-codex
description: Goal-lifecycle control for Codex: bind intent, gate risky changes, steer active goals, recover diagnostics, and close acceptance with evidence.

interface.longDescription: Socratic Codex protects user-owned intent across discovery, goal binding, planning, execution steering, diagnostic recovery, boundary gates, and acceptance closure. It re-anchors on brake or drift signals, asks only action-changing questions, preserves compact goal contracts, distinguishes inspectable facts from user-owned boundaries, and avoids completion claims until evidence matches done criteria. Use it for /goal drafting and steering, solution-shaped requests, risky target changes, stuck diagnostics, and acceptance handoff; skip routine deterministic work outside an active lifecycle.
